title: Your Guide to TDX 2026: Vibe Coding Edition
author: Gene Eun

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: TDX returns to San Francisco and Salesforce+ on April 15–16, 2026. This year’s event offers unprecedented access to the architects behind our latest innovations, providing the deep-dive technical knowledge your team needs. For organizations looking to transition from legacy systems to an AI-first strategy,TDXis an essential stop for your enterprise’s journey. It’s an investment that pays off, and the data backs it up: 96% of past attendees said TDX was worth their time and investment, and 95% say they were able to find solutions that helped address a business challenge. In this new era of development, “vibe coding” is more than hype or a trend — it’s a shift in how we build. To help you take advantage of this pivotal moment, we’ve curated the ultimate TDX 2026 guide for all future vibe coders.

sections.heading: Back to the basics
sections.text: Before we get there, you might be asking yourself: What is vibe coding? What is TDX? How do these two come together? First there’svibe codingis a new way to build. Developers and domain experts use natural language and iterative feedback loops to manifest functional, production-ready applications. Next we haveTDX. It’s Salesforce’s premier developer conference, where attendees can experience the future of Salesforce development and learn how to build it. It’s a home for admins, developers, and architects to come together to sharpen technical skills and have real conversations about the future of development. Attendees will be able to access product sneak peeks, converse with product experts, and connect with fellow Trailblazers. It will be an innovation-packed 2 days, but here are the highlights: Join hundreds of sessionsto get technical and hands-on.Get 1:1 time with Salesforce expertsin the Ask the Expert Zone, a dedicated space to find solutions, custom to your org. Experts will be grouped by specialty — including Agentforce, Pro Code & DevOps, and more.Participate in the virtual TDX Hackathonwhere you can connect with Trailblazers globally. What’s new this year is that we’ll be featuring a plethora of new vibe coding content to learn about all things intent-based development and Agentforce Vibes.

sections.heading: Bring the best vibes to TDX
sections.text: So much to do, so little time. Whether you’re an avid vibe coder or looking to start, TDX is the place for you to learn. Learn how to build with trust, scale your vibes, and get a preview of the Agentforce Vibes roadmap. From building with trust to platform product roadmaps — the fullsession catalogfeatures many topics for all roles. But if you’re looking for the vibes, here are the must-attend sessions to add to your agenda: Main Keynote This may go without being said, but kicking off TDX with the main keynote is essential. Discover how to build your Agentic Enterprise with Salesforce and unlock the power of humans and agents driving customer success together. Build Enterprise-Ready Apps with Agentforce Vibes Vibe coding is fast, but grounding makes it enterprise-ready. Learn how the Unified Catalog and Metadata MCP Tools provide the context Agentforce needs to build trusted, well-architected metadata. Build React Apps with Agentforce Vibes Build with React on the Agentforce 360 Platform using Agentforce Vibes. Deliver scalable experiences with rapid iteration for customers, employees, and partners. Salesforce Developer Tools Roadmap: Vibe Coding, MCP, and ALM Join product managers for a roadmap and live Q&A on Salesforce Agentic DX. Explore upcoming tools for enterprise vibe coding, ALM, MCP, and other developer capabilities. Build AI Solutions with Agentforce Vibes See how Agentforce Vibes turns business requirements into real functional demos using Salesforce Flow and Prompt Builder. Watch as we build solutions live. Build, Configure, and Scale Faster with Agentforce AI is accelerating how Salesforce admins innovate. Use natural language prompts with Agentforce Vibes and Setup with Agentforce to quickly build and configure apps. Preview What’s Next for Agentforce Vibes Join product owners for a sneak peek at the latest Agentforce Vibes updates and live Q&A. Explore the roadmap for new skills and upcoming enhancements. For the first time, TDX attendees will be able to experience an immersive hands-on space — theAgentforce Vibes Zone.Developers, admins, and architects can explore and build with Agentforce Vibes. No prior experience required. You will be able to explore demos, talk to product experts, and jump into a guided, hands-on project to apply what you’ve learned in real time. At the end, you’ll have a clear understanding of how you can use vibe coding to develop full-stack innovations at lightning speed. If you want a front row seat to the future of development, this is it. At TDX we’re eliminating silos. Connect with Trailblazers across the globe and compete for a grand prize in the TDX Hackathon. You’ll be able to create a virtual team to develop a creative solution on the Agentforce 360 Platform. Finalists will pitch live on stage at the Hackathon Showdown on the first day of TDX. Ready to bring your ideas to life with fellow developers, admins, and architects? Build your team andsign up today. Not competing? No problem. Attend the Hackathon Showdown in person at TDX to watch the innovation unfold, live, in front of four esteemed judges. If you’re curious about what’s possible, check out some of the most impactfulsubmissions from the 2025 Agentforce Virtual Hackathon.

inline_links.text: submissions from the 2025 Agentforce Virtual Hackathon.

sections.heading: Your official invite
sections.text: This guide only skims the surface of everything happening at TDX 2026. From Agentforce City, Mini Hacks, a TDX celebration — this is an event you won’t want to miss. Learn new skills, explore platform updates, and build together. At TDX, you’ll be at the forefront of the largest technological shift in decades. Register to attendin-person in San Francisco, orstream for free on Salesforce+.

existing_ctas.heading: Get the best of both worlds
existing_ctas.body: Security and innovation go hand-in-hand. Integrate security from the start, ensuring every process, app, and agent stays protected with the DevSecOps Guide.

existing_ctas.heading: End-to-end AI development on one platform
existing_ctas.body: Get to know the platform that enables rapid innovation with airtight security. Unlock the Agentforce 360 Platform in a free 30-day trial.

raw_html:
TDX returns to San Francisco and Salesforce+ on April 15–16, 2026. This year’s event offers unprecedented access to the architects behind our latest innovations, providing the deep-dive technical knowledge your team needs.

For organizations looking to transition from legacy systems to an AI-first strategy, TDX is an essential stop for your enterprise’s journey. It’s an investment that pays off, and the data backs it up: 96% of past attendees said TDX was worth their time and investment, and 95% say they were able to find solutions that helped address a business challenge.

In this new era of development, “vibe coding” is more than hype or a trend — it’s a shift in how we build. To help you take advantage of this pivotal moment, we’ve curated the ultimate TDX 2026 guide for all future vibe coders. 

Back to the basics

Before we get there, you might be asking yourself: What is vibe coding? What is TDX? How do these two come together?

First there’s vibe coding is  a new way to build. Developers and domain experts use natural language and iterative feedback loops to manifest functional, production-ready applications.

Meet your personal coding assistant.

No need to code the plumbing. Focus on building the innovation with Agentforce Vibes. Learn more on Trailhead, Salesforce's free online learning platform.

Hit the trails
+400 points
Trail

Agentforce Vibes

Learn the ways of this trail.

Next we have TDX. It’s Salesforce’s premier developer conference, where attendees can experience the future of Salesforce development and learn how to build it. It’s a home for admins, developers, and architects to come together to sharpen technical skills and have real conversations about the future of development.

Attendees will be able to access product sneak peeks, converse with product experts, and connect with fellow Trailblazers. It will be an innovation-packed 2 days, but here are the highlights:

  • Join hundreds of sessions to get technical and hands-on. 
  • Get 1:1 time with Salesforce experts in the Ask the Expert Zone, a dedicated space to find solutions, custom to your org. Experts will be grouped by specialty — including Agentforce, Pro Code & DevOps, and more.
  • Participate in the virtual TDX Hackathon where you can connect with Trailblazers globally. 

What’s new this year is that we’ll be featuring a plethora of new vibe coding content to learn about all things intent-based development and Agentforce Vibes.

Bring the best vibes to TDX

So much to do, so little time. Whether you’re an avid vibe coder or looking to start, TDX is the place for you to learn. Learn how to build with trust, scale your vibes, and get a preview of the Agentforce Vibes roadmap. 

Sessions to attend

From building with trust to platform product roadmaps — the full session catalog features many topics for all roles. But if you’re looking for the vibes, here are the must-attend sessions to add to your agenda:

Main Keynote

This may go without being said, but kicking off TDX with the main keynote is essential. Discover how to build your Agentic Enterprise with Salesforce and unlock the power of humans and agents driving customer success together.

Build Enterprise-Ready Apps with Agentforce Vibes

Vibe coding is fast, but grounding makes it enterprise-ready. Learn how the Unified Catalog and Metadata MCP Tools provide the context Agentforce needs to build trusted, well-architected metadata.

Get the best of both worlds

Security and innovation go hand-in-hand. Integrate security from the start, ensuring every process, app, and agent stays protected with the DevSecOps Guide.

Download for free

Build React Apps with Agentforce Vibes

Build with React on the Agentforce 360 Platform using Agentforce Vibes. Deliver scalable experiences with rapid iteration for customers, employees, and partners.

Salesforce Developer Tools Roadmap: Vibe Coding, MCP, and ALM

Join product managers for a roadmap and live Q&A on Salesforce Agentic DX. Explore upcoming tools for enterprise vibe coding, ALM, MCP, and other developer capabilities. 

Build AI Solutions with Agentforce Vibes

See how Agentforce Vibes turns business requirements into real functional demos using Salesforce Flow and Prompt Builder. Watch as we build solutions live.

Build, Configure, and Scale Faster with Agentforce

AI is accelerating how Salesforce admins innovate. Use natural language prompts with Agentforce Vibes and Setup with Agentforce to quickly build and configure apps.

Preview What’s Next for Agentforce Vibes

Join product owners for a sneak peek at the latest Agentforce Vibes updates and live Q&A. Explore the roadmap for new skills and upcoming enhancements.

Onsite activations

For the first time, TDX attendees will be able to experience an immersive hands-on space — the Agentforce Vibes Zone. Developers, admins, and architects can explore and build with Agentforce Vibes. No prior experience required.

You will be able to explore demos, talk to product experts, and jump into a guided, hands-on project to apply what you’ve learned in real time. 

At the end, you’ll have a clear understanding of how you can use vibe coding to develop full-stack innovations at lightning speed. If you want a front row seat to the future of development, this is it.

End-to-end AI development on one platform

Get to know the platform that enables rapid innovation with airtight security. Unlock the Agentforce 360 Platform in a free 30-day trial.

Sign up

Participate in the TDX Hackathon

At TDX we’re eliminating silos.

Connect with Trailblazers across the globe and compete for a grand prize in the TDX Hackathon. You’ll be able to create a virtual team to develop a creative solution on the Agentforce 360 Platform. Finalists will pitch live on stage at the Hackathon Showdown on the first day of TDX.

Ready to bring your ideas to life with fellow developers, admins, and architects? Build your team and sign up today.

Not competing? No problem. Attend the Hackathon Showdown in person at TDX to watch the innovation unfold, live, in front of four esteemed judges. If you’re curious about what’s possible, check out some of the most impactful submissions from the 2025 Agentforce Virtual Hackathon. 

Your official invite 

This guide only skims the surface of everything happening at TDX 2026. From Agentforce City, Mini Hacks, a TDX celebration — this is an event you won’t want to miss. 

Learn new skills, explore platform updates, and build together. At TDX, you’ll be at the forefront of the largest technological shift in decades. Register to attend in-person in San Francisco, or stream for free on Salesforce+.
